releaseNotes: Adds a cross-platform motion token contract: motion.durationSlow and motion.reducedMotionDuration promote to web CSS variables and a DesignTokens.Motion enum for SwiftUI.

Wires framer-motion (the motion package) into the Design Room render preview and documents framer-motion + ui-ux-pro-max as the web-surface motion/UI lane, with native animation kept for the shipped mobile binary.
Adds motion and reduced-motion gates to token promotion, UX patterns, the 11-star experience, and a WCAG contrast warning in the Design Room contract.
